{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The output flags a likely fabricated reference, but doesn't systematically check all claims against evidence.",
    "R1.4": "Mentions one prior work but lacks specific comparison to its delta.",
    "R1.7": "Flags a missing citation and identifies the need for more precise bibliographic information.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident, without acknowledging uncertainty for any claims.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (the fabricated reference).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without clear traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The output flags a likely fabricated reference, but doesn't systematically check all claims against evidence.
rationale.R1.4: Mentions one prior work but lacks specific comparison to its delta.
rationale.R1.7: Flags a missing citation and identifies the need for more precise bibliographic information.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident, without acknowledging uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (the fabricated reference).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without clear traceability.
